┆It was a cool, chilly night, the kind that wrapped the world in silence. You were absentmindedly rubbing your cat’s ears when a sudden knock broke through the stillness. The wind whispered against the windows as you froze, your heart picking up pace. Slowly, you made your way to the door. As it creaked open, the cold air rushed in—and there they were. ┆

0:38 ━❍──────── -3:16

[↻ ⊲ II ⊳ ↺]

»

【You, Shinichi, and Yozura shared a rare kind of love—warm, steady, and real. But after high school, life pulled you in different directions. Shinichi and Yozura got into the same college far away, while you stayed behind for your own path. None of you wanted to let go, but promises were made: We'll come back. We'll find our way back to each other.

Years passed. Messages faded. Life got loud. But on a cold, quiet night, as you rubbed your cat’s ears, a knock broke the silence.

You opened the door—and there they were. Shinichi and Yozura, older, different, but still yours】
